headline: Bi/Multispecific Drugs in Oncology Analytical Tool Featuring Top Developers - Amgen, Hoffmann-La Roche, J&J, Xencor, Biocytogen - Unlocking New Precision, Immune Activation, and Therapeutic Potential
summary: Bi/multispecific drugs in oncology present key opportunities: precision targeting, innovative immune modulation, and personalized therapies.
